title: Tracking the shadow fleet: How Iran evaded the US naval blockade in Hormuz
snippet: Al Jazeera investigation tracked 202 voyages by 185 vessels through Hormuz between March 1 and April 15. At least 26 ships bypassed US blockade line per Lloyd's List. Evasion tactics: fake flags, shell companies, disabled AIS trackers, coastal routes. Iranian cargo '13448' broke blockade via Karachi. Panama-flagged Manali crossed twice (Apr 14, Apr 17 to Mumbai).
tag_reason: First comprehensive investigation quantifying blockade evasion; 202 voyages / 185 vessels data new
